title: Sitemap Composition Audit — 656 URLs
methodology: Full sitemap curl + source code inspection + live sampling (50 random URLs + 30 tool/guide URLs)

tool.indexable: YES — all sampled indexable (index,follow, self-canonical, HTTP 200)
tool.noindex: NO — 0 of 10 sampled show noindex. Noindexed formula variants are correctly EXCLUDED from sitemap
tool.index_status: SOME — GSC-approved tools have impressions. Most are discovered-not-indexed
tool.intentional_in_sitemap: YES for clean variants. NO for GSC-exempted noindex variants (2 URLs)
tool.risk: LOW-MEDIUM — Clean variants are thin but indexable. 2 GSC-exempted URLs are noindexed (contradiction)

calculator.indexable: YES — all calculators are indexable core pages
calculator.index_status: MOST — core site pages, some indexed

guide.indexable: YES — all guides are indexable (index,follow, HTTP 200)
guide.noindex: NO — guide template has no noindex logic
guide.index_status: MOSTLY discovered-not-indexed — thin 'how to use X' pages
guide.intentional_in_sitemap: DEBATABLE — indexable but thin. Low value but not spam
guide.risk: MEDIUM — 125 thin pages dilute sitemap quality signal

blog.gsc_impressions: 2 in top 30 (149 imp at pos 10.6 — TOP IMPRESSION DRIVER)

geo_calculator.indexable: YES — only GSC-approved geo pages kept

other.description: Static pages: privacy, terms, about, contact, methodology, etc.

phase32_4_correction: Phase 32.4 claimed '353 tools + guides are noindexed and create 53.8% sitemap bloat.' This was WRONG. The sitemap filter (isFormulaVariant) correctly excludes noindexed formula variants. The 225 tools and 125 guides in the sitemap are ALL indexable (index,follow, self-canonical, HTTP 200). The bloat concern is about page VALUE (thin content), not technical noindex pollution.

known_issues.issue: HTTP 404 — should be removed from sitemap
GSC-exempted but noindexed on page — contradiction
GSC-exempted but noindexed on page — contradiction
